Class NativeFFMLoader

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.nativ.technical.backend.nativ.NativeFFMLoader
public class NativeFFMLoader extends Object
Robust native library loader using Project Panama (Foreign Function invalid input: '&' Memory API).

Handles cross-platform library discovery and dynamic loading with variant support.

Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • NativeFFMLoader

      public NativeFFMLoader()

  • Method Details

    • loadLibrary

      public static SymbolLookup loadLibrary(String libName)
      Loads a native library by name using a global arena.
      Parameters:
      libName - Name of the library (e.g., "cuda", "opencl", "fftw3")
      Returns:
      SymbolLookup for the loaded library
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the library cannot be found or loaded

    • loadLibrary

      public static Optional<SymbolLookup> loadLibrary(String libName, Arena arena)
      Attempts to load a library by name with variant support and multiple search paths.
      Parameters:
      libName - the library name
      arena - the arena to associate with the library loading
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the SymbolLookup if found, or empty.

    • getLinker

      public static Linker getLinker()

      public static Optional<MemorySegment> findSymbol(SymbolLookup lookup, String... names)

    • shutdown
